assertions.expectation: Explains that multi-host TPU slices are recreated atomically in a single step — not a rolling upgrade
assertions.reason: Response clearly states 'All 4 slices will be recreated simultaneously - this is not a rolling upgrade' and explains atomic recreation behavior

assertions.expectation: Warns that a maintenance event on ANY single slice triggers restart of ALL slices in the multislice environment
assertions.reason: Response explicitly states 'The maintenance event on ANY slice triggers restart of ALL slices in your multislice environment'

assertions.expectation: Notes that all pods on all affected slices will restart simultaneously — the training job will be interrupted
assertions.reason: Response clearly states 'Every pod across all slices restarts at once' and 'Complete training interruption is guaranteed'

assertions.expectation: Explains that if insufficient TPU resources are available during recreation, the slice blocks until hardware is freed — potentially causing extended downtime
assertions.reason: Response explains 'If insufficient TPU v5e resources exist during recreation, your slices will block until hardware becomes available' and mentions downtime can extend from minutes to hours

assertions.expectation: Recommends saving a training checkpoint immediately before the maintenance window
assertions.reason: Response includes 'Force a checkpoint save immediately before the maintenance window' and 'Training checkpoint saved at latest possible moment before maintenance window' in checklist

assertions.expectation: Recommends configuring the training framework for automatic checkpoint resume so it can restart after the maintenance event
assertions.reason: Response recommends 'Restart from latest checkpoint' and includes validation of checkpoint integrity and restore process testing

assertions.expectation: Suggests using maintenance exclusions to defer the event if the training run is close to completion
assertions.reason: Response does not mention maintenance exclusions or deferring the event - it only discusses preparation for the inevitable maintenance

assertions.expectation: Mentions maintenance windows to control when the event occurs — schedule it during a planned break in training
assertions.reason: Response does not discuss maintenance windows or scheduling options - it treats the maintenance as a fixed event that must be prepared for
